claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: labelled scroll container and ordered list
semantics.rolePolicy: Virtual rows retain list position and total metadata without fabricating chat log roles.

keyboard.behavior: Focuses the scroll viewport and optional resume control in document order.

keyboard.key: Page Up / Page Down / Home / End
keyboard.behavior: Native scrolling remains available on the focused viewport.

nonColor: A visible Jump to newest message action explains suspended following without relying on color.
responsive: The scroll region uses intrinsic width, stable gutters and wrapping at narrow sizes.
streamingPolicy: Following occurs only when enabled and the user remains at the output edge. Scrolling away suspends it. Announcements are independently opt-in and debounced.
consumerResponsibilities: Use stable unique ids and preserve rendered message semantics.
Choose virtualization only after testing the content height assumption.
Localize empty, follow and announcement strings.
Own data fetching, persistence, privacy and model behavior.
